name: ShotLab
address: 478 S Frontage Rd Suite 102, Springville, UT 84663
about: ShotLab is a dual-simulator venue offering both golf and firearm simulation experiences in Springville, UT. The facility features premium Trackman iO golf simulators with access to full courses and games, alongside cutting-edge firearm simulators with activities for all skill levels. Memberships are available for unlimited golf at $99/month with the option for yearly plans, while non-members can book by the hour. The venue hosts leagues, events, and offers a spacious, modern event space suitable for up to 30 guests, making it adaptable for both casual play and organized gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman iO technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Unlimited monthly membership at an affordable $99 price point
Flexible booking with two-week advance reservations for members
Access to golf leagues and events with competitive prizes
Spacious, modern facility suitable for both solo and group play

food_and_drink.notes: Food is allowed in the facility, with mentions of popcorn served at events
No alcohol mentioned on-site; BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line golf simulator with full course access and game modes

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators. The facility does not mention club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food is allowed in the facility, with mentions of popcorn served at events. Alcohol is not mentioned as being available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the exact time for 18 holes, but the simulators allow for flexible play, and members have unlimited access.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, ShotLab is kid-friendly, with mentions of youth groups, family gatherings, and activities suitable for all ages, including kids learning to shoot.
